summary: Arabic books API fix verified - all features working correctly. The gRPC client SSL fix (nodeOptions) and list request payload fix (removing empty fields) successfully resolved the issue. Arabic API now returns 19,035 books.
critical_code_review_comments: The Arabic API fix correctly matches the reference project (abl-4-web) by adding nodeOptions for SSL and removing empty fields from list request
context_for_next_testing_agent: Arabic books API is fully working. The fix involved: 1) Adding nodeOptions (rejectUnauthorized: false, requestCert: false) to gRPC transport in /app/src/lib/abl/client.ts, 2) Removing empty fields (isDownloaded, status, tags, bookIds) from list request in /app/src/app/api/abl/books/route.ts. API now returns 19,035 books with proper pagination.

arabic_books_list.result: Returns books array with 19,035 total items

arabic_book_detail.result: Returns book with Arabic title 'التعليقات على شرح الدواني للعقائد العضدية'

arabic_books_pagination.result: Page 1 and Page 2 return different books

arabic_api_fix.issue: Arabic books API was returning 0 results
arabic_api_fix.fix_applied: 1) Added nodeOptions (rejectUnauthorized: false, requestCert: false) to gRPC transport, 2) Removed empty fields from list request payload
arabic_api_fix.verification: API now returns 19,035 books with proper pagination
